overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking down a wide tree-lined avenue toward the Grand Palais in Paris. The character passes through an open plaza featuring large abstract sculptures before approaching the historic building's entrance. The footage displays game UI elements at the bottom of the screen.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wide avenue lined with mature trees on both sides

entered.detail: dense row of mature green trees lining the left side of the avenue
dense row of mature green trees lining the right side of the avenue
large classical stone building with glass roof visible in the distance
wide asphalt surface with faded lane markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily down a wide, tree-lined ceremonial avenue under a partly cloudy sky. The Grand Palais building is visible in the far distance, framed by dense rows of mature trees on both sides creating a natural corridor.

events.description: text overlay 'GRAND PALAIS' appears prominently on screen
character walks past a parked white SUV on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the Grand Palais while passing a parked vehicle on the right

notable_agents.action: white SUV parked stationary on the right side of the plaza

entered.detail: white sport utility vehicle parked on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The text 'GRAND PALAIS' appears on screen as the character emerges from the tree-lined avenue into an open plaza. The tree lines recede into the background, and the character passes a parked white SUV on the right while the historic building grows larger in the frame.

events.description: large abstract sculptures become visible in the plaza foreground

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the building while approaching the sculpture installation

entered.detail: large abstract metal sculptures with angular geometric shapes scattered across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the expansive paved plaza as large abstract metal sculptures come into view on the right side. The Grand Palais dominates the center of the frame, with its classical stone facade and glass roof becoming more detailed as the distance closes.

agents.ego_description: walking between the large sculptures toward the main entrance of the Grand Palais

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the main entrance of the Grand Palais

segments.scene_description: The character walks between the towering abstract sculptures that flank the final approach to the Grand Palais. The building's ornate stone facade, columns, and entrance stairs now fill the center of the view as the character moves through the outdoor art installation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a secluded, tree-lined corridor that gradually opens into a vast urban plaza before arriving at a monumental historic facade. It begins with the character walking down a wide ceremonial avenue, where dense rows of mature trees frame the distant Grand Palais under a partly cloudy sky. As the character emerges from this natural corridor, the tree lines recede and the scene expands into an open plaza, passing a parked white SUV as the building grows larger in the frame. The camera then glides across the expansive paved area, shifting focus toward large abstract metal sculptures on the right while the classical stone facade and glass roof of the palace become increasingly detailed. Finally, the view narrows as the character moves between the towering sculptures, bringing the ornate columns and entrance stairs of the Grand Palais into full view.
